records.ety: [OF. acusation, F. accusation, L. accusatio, fr. accusare. See Accuse.]

defs: The act of accusing or charging with a crime or with a lighter offense.
quotes: We come not by the way of accusation To taint that honor every good tongue blesses.

defs: That of which one is accused; the charge of an offense or crime, or the declaration containing the charge.
quotes: [They] set up over his head his accusation.
